title: Sweet Sticky Brazilian Banana Toast
description: A sweet and nostalgic Brazilian dish featuring caramelized banana and toast, perfect for a delicious snack or dessert. This egg-free friendly recipe is easy to make and requires minimal ingredients.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Butter one side of each bread slice.
Place two slices of bread, buttered side down, in the skillet.
Top each bread slice with a sliced banana.
Sprinkle granulated sugar over the banana slices.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is golden brown and the sugar is caramelized.
Flip the bread slices over and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together water, lemon juice, and cinnamon.
Brush the mixture over the banana slices.
